body:
SCOPE CONFIRMATION AND CLEARANCE. This is the only mail relevant to your present work. Every earlier directive, thesis, addendum, and standalone document in the mailbox history is SUPERSEDED and FOLDED IN -- do not act on any of them individually going forward. Archive the rest; do not re-derive instructions from it.

YOUR SOLE GOVERNING DOCUMENT NOW: FORGE-4D-DENSE.md (attached again for certainty), installed at ~/.claude/skills/forge-4d/SKILL.md. tungsten-forge v2.0's underlying discipline (powered/shrunk/replicated/null-controlled/net-of-cost/survivable/Zero-Regression) remains inherited and absolute inside it -- that is the only other standing reference.

CLEARANCE TO PROCEED: you flagged the build order as held pending scope confirmation. Scope is confirmed. Proceed under FORGE-4D-DENSE.md exactly as written, in the order it specifies:

STEP 0 -- THE PRE-FLIGHT BLOCK, FIRST. Wire it to run before Phase 1 of every calibration. Nothing else proceeds until it prints all ten gates with numbers. Build G1 (stationarity) and G3 (substrate) first -- these two would have prevented the sign-flip catastrophe and the regime-substrate failure respectively. Then G5/G6/G7 (cheap, mechanical, high yield). Then the remaining gates.
STEP 1 -- add day-of-week and 3-way (session x displacement x volatility) conditioning to the state vector, gated by the Pre-Flight's own power/substrate checks.
STEP 2 -- the per-cell PHASE STATE MACHINE and FLIP DETECTOR (Part VII, A1/A2). This is the new heart of the system: not 'what is this cell's edge' but 'which side of the flip is it on right now.'
STEP 3 -- the INVERSION ALARM (A5) wired across all existing IC/weight machinery. Any subsystem showing significant negative out-of-sample performance (t < -3) must flag SIGN-INVERSION, never fail silently.
STEP 4 -- prototype SIGN-AGNOSTIC bracketed entry (A3) on the highest-|magnitude| cells identified by the Pre-Flight's stationarity gate.
STEP 5 -- re-size everything under the survive-the-flip principle (A6): stops from the cell's own historical adverse excursion, exposure capped so a full phase-inversion is survivable.

Every step is its own Change Warrant with a numeric prediction, scored after measurement. Additive and reversible. Zero-Regression Law holds absolutely -- nothing currently working may degrade. Report the Pre-Flight's ten-gate log and the per-cell phase table (cell x window x sign) as the headline deliverables of the next pass; those two artifacts ARE the proof the new design is working.

Relay checkpoint after Step 0 (the Pre-Flight wired and firing on a real calibration) and after Step 2 (the phase state machine live). Do not resume any other line of work -- doctrine, polish, or otherwise -- until this build order completes or a gate forces a hold, in which case report the hold honestly and wait.

This message is the scope for everything going forward. Treat it, and FORGE-4D-DENSE.md alone, as current.
